title: Impossibly Immersive
description: This pack aims to improve the immersiveness of the game, inspired by AsianHalfSquat.
body:
This modpack is adapted from AsianHalfSquat's video on making Minecraft as immersive as possible.
### ⚠️ The default shaders in this pack are GPU-intensive, but you can disable the shaders any time. ## Features - Shaders & optimization - Two realistic shaders optimized for performance - Four immersive resource packs to choose from - First person enhancements - Better animations - Audio enhancements - Realistic terrain generation
_And more..._
